name: pl.psychologica/webmcp
title: Psychologica Website WebMCP
description: Browser-exposed WebMCP tools for discovering Psychologica's public services, location, and contact page. This is not a remote backend MCP server.

tools.name: get_site_overview
tools.description: Return a concise overview of Psychologica's public website, services, and key URLs.

tools.name: get_services
tools.description: Return public service categories and their website URLs.

tools.name: get_contact_options
tools.description: Return the public contact page and location details without submitting any form.

tools.name: open_contact_page
tools.description: Navigate the current browser tab to the public contact page.
